headline: Textron (TXT) On New Aircraft Orders And Bell Demand As Undervalued View Holds
summary: Textron (TXT) is back in focus after Pipistrel named Epic Flight Academy the launch customer for the new Voyager trainer and Bell celebrated delivery of its 700th Bell 505 helicopter, highlighting the company’s broad aviation footprint. See our latest analysis for Textron. Against this aviation news backdrop, Textron’s share price sits at US$90.79, with a 7-day share price return of 1.53% and a year to date share price return of 4.30%. Its 1-year total shareholder return of 7.22% and 3-year...
